output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Fight Back in 60 Seconds
output.meta_description: Is your landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your tenant rights and send a legally sound demand letter in 60 seconds for just $19.99—no sign-up required.
content_outline: Why Your Landlord Is Withholding Your Deposit (And Why It's Often Illegal)
What Landlords Can and Cannot Deduct From Your Security Deposit
How to Demand Your Deposit Back in 60 Seconds Without a Lawyer
key_points: Most states require landlords to return deposits within 14–45 days with an itemized list of deductions
Normal wear and tear, scuffed floors, and faded paint cannot be legally deducted from your deposit
Tenants who send formal demand letters are significantly more likely to recover their full deposit
Deposits-Back.com generates state-specific demand letters in 60 seconds for a one-time $19.99 fee with zero subscription or account creation
output.cta: Don't let your landlord keep what's yours. Generate your security deposit demand letter in 60 seconds for just $19.99 at Deposits-Back.com—no sign-ups, no subscriptions, no stress.
output.target_audience: Problem-aware US renters who are frustrated because their landlord is withholding, deducting from, or refusing to return their security deposit
